rules.name: Subsidiary_Custom_Metadata_Not_Blank_Renewal
rules.label: Subsidiary Custom Metadata Not Blank Renewal

Flow.description: BIZ-65528 Sync QTC BIZ-65271 Remove sales segment from opportunity owner BIZ-65428: Updated defaults of quote billing fields BIZ-46112 ; made changes according to BIZ-46098 and BIZ-47359 ( Updating fields from contract to amend or renew quote ) ,BIZ -45104 ( Updating bill to and ship to account from quote account at time of quote creation ), BIZ-47653,BIZ-47915 Populating the Renewal Quote Type - BIZ-47716,BIZ-47653,45090 Default Record type for Amendment and Renewal Quote is set to Defaukt RT - BIZ-49667 Line of business value updated for certain case BIZ-49662.Data Model Changes for OSA: BIZ-50017 Field mapping from Contract BIZ-50474. Mapping OP4i Sales Segment from Opportunity Owner BIZ-53899 BIZ-58801 - Billing Address and Shipping address for renewals and amendments should be based on the contract and not on the account. BIZ-62800 - QTC Stage - Value of Contract Master Terms is not populated on Renewal Quote BIZ-66630 - SF Quote Stage did not Update to Pending Closure BIZ-67033 - Update Cancellation Fee Details BIZ-66415 - Added the Bypass Logic BIZ-67669 - Added Amendment Count Logic
Flow.label: Quote Before Insert
